properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Noah had drifted On the floods many days, He searched for land In various ways Troubles he had some, But not from above, God gave him His sign On the wings of a dove.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: On the wings of a snow-white dove, God sends down His pure, sweet love, A sign from above, On the wings of a dove.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Jesus, our Saviour Came to earth one day; He was born in a stable, In a manger of hay; Though here rejected, But not from above, God gave us His sign, On the wings of a dove.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Though I have suffered In many a way, I cried for healing Both night and day; Faith wasn't forgotten By the Father above, He gave me His sign On the wings of a dove.
